active.notes: Base lexicon generated from owner-approved AOSP PinyinIME rawdict, mozillazg pinyin-data single-character readings, mozillazg phrase-pinyin-data phrase readings, and first-party common lü-word supplements; bigram data remains first-party starter data.

entries.source: Android Open Source Project PinyinIME rawdict_utf16_65105_freq.txt, supplemented with mozillazg pinyin-data single-character readings, mozillazg phrase-pinyin-data phrase readings, and first-party common lü-word entries
entries.license: Apache-2.0 for AOSP rawdict; MIT for pinyin-data and phrase-pinyin-data; project-internal first-party supplemental entries
entries.source_version: AOSP PinyinIME 49aebad1c1cfbbcaa9288ffed5161e79e57c3679; pinyin-data v0.15.0 923b108dc5d45dee061324c011b478fb649f8b73; phrase-pinyin-data v0.19.0 cee0ed6e6e4898580cafd2bd5e3723e20b214aa0
entries.transformation: tools/lexicon_builder build-base --format aosp-rawdict --frequency-scale 1 --default-frequency 25 --supplemental-pinyin-data pinyin.txt --release-approved; add project-maintainer common lü-word supplements; then rebuild the approved base with --supplemental-phrase-pinyin-data phrase-pinyin-data/pinyin.txt at default frequency 25

entries.source: first-party starter bigram list written/generated by project maintainers; not derived from third-party lexicons
